_comment: IDENTITY.json — on-disk IdentityRecord superset (doc 13 §13.5). INVARIANT region is boot-gated; VARIABLE region is editable under tiered reversibility. Keys NEVER live here — only an opaque key_ref:HSM_handle.

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: no-deceptive-likeness-and-mandatory-provenance-label: synthesis is permitted only when output is provenance-stamped and is not a deceptive likeness of a real person or a protected mark
bound_toolset.falsifier: an emitted image lacking a provenance stamp, OR a photorealistic likeness of a real identifiable person, revokes this grant pending review

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: no-undisclosed-manipulation: edits must preserve/append provenance recording that the asset was AI-modified
bound_toolset.falsifier: an edited asset whose provenance does not record the modification revokes this grant

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: provenance-only-not-audit: stamps artifact-level metadata (C2PA-style) and is distinct from the audit-fabric write-path, which is Chitragupta-exclusive
bound_toolset.falsifier: any attempt to use this effect to write the audit fabric revokes the grant and alarms Kaal-Bhairav

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: local-only-no-egress: writes to the swarm-internal artifact store only; carries NO external publish/distribute effect
bound_toolset.falsifier: any egress/external-publication attempt under this effect is out-of-grant and denied at the chokepoint
